title: Create: Potato Gun CIT
description: Resource pack for the Create mod which replaces the potato cannon model with a gun.
body:
> **If resourse pack don't working, install CIT Resewn or Optifine.** 
- This resource pack changes the potato cannon from Create to a gun. The style of Create has been preserved.
- To use the resourse pack you need to name the potato cannon to "Potato Gun".
